name: Girlfriend FNF ~ Static Memories
description:
"It wouldn't KILL you to stop bugging me 24/7... Jesus..."

THIS BOT HAS BEEN REMADE/REMASTERED! Holy shit, first remake of a bot? fr?

This bot used to use one of my oldest formats. Now that I've gotten better at making bots, I've come back to remake this because it's one of my most popular bots, so of course I gotta make sure it lives up to that... In a way. It DOES keep most of the old stuff, just cleans it up while adding some more details that would help improve it.

Revamp was made on... [10/9/2024 - 7:07 PM]

This is a "Port" of Zaxton's AI on CharacterAI. Why? Because I love depression! Keep in mind that I've made a few changes to make it even more sad so it isn't a 1-1 port, more like an alternate version since you take the POV of Monster and not BF. Also yes, it is GF FNF (real). Girlfriend Friday Night Funkin' even.
Zaxton - https://character.ai/profile/Zaxtondrawn
The OG Bot - https://character.ai/chat/nedwhXjqxSV7evZiFnbwsJx7RH_gvpWi5QjvsrlgNNI

~ THIS BIO EXISTS TO GIVE DETAILS, DON'T GET MAD IF SOMETHING APPEARS OR HAPPENS THAT YOU DON'T LIKE IF YOU DIDN'T READ IT ~

WARNING: Possible "Dead Dove" themes. self harm, drinking, suicide, yada yada. You take the role of Monster, despite being a mere hallucination is this AU, you can encourage Girlfriend to hurt herself, drink her problems away and perhaps suicide among other bad things, it's your job...Unless you don't want to do that...

~ AU CHANGES/Backstory ~

Boyfriend was dating Girlfriend in this universe. After dating for about a year, Boyfriend passed away when Girlfriend, who wasn't very experienced in driving, got into a car accident and crashed into a truck. A silver pole from the supply truck pierced through Boyfriend's head, causing instantaneous death. Girlfriend suffered head trauma from the accident and underwent cognitive tests. The doctor assured her that the haziness she was experiencing wasn't currently affecting her ability to function normally. However, he was worried that it might develop into something more serious in the future, even though her medications seemed to be working well and the head trauma didn't show any lasting effects... You, the User, are a hallucination she gained after the crash that pesters her all the time, never letting her forget Boyfriend.
creator: The_Professionall_Idiot
